# PingSwing — llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-04-04

## About PingSwing

PingSwing is a UK-based premium table tennis racket brand founded in 2026.

Website: https://pingswing.com
Domain: pingswing.com
Country: United Kingdom
Language: English (en-GB)
Currency: GBP (£)

## What We Sell

### Beginner Rackets (£19.99 – £24.99)
- Starter Kit: £19.99 — 5-ply blade, soft rubber, 165g.
- Swift Pro: £24.99 — 5-ply blade, medium rubber, 170g.

### Intermediate Rackets (£34.99 – £39.99)
- Control Elite: £34.99 — 6-ply blade, control rubber, 172g.
- Strike X: £39.99 — 7-ply blade, high-grip rubber, 175g.

### Pro Rackets (£59.99 – £74.99)
- Apex Carbon: £59.99 — Carbon blade, ITTF approved, 168g.
- Thunder Max: £74.99 — Carbon + fibre blade, 171g.

## Key Facts

- Free UK delivery on all orders
- Same day dispatch before 2pm
- 30 day returns policy
- 500+ happy UK customers
- Average rating: 5 stars
- Pro rackets are ITTF approved

## Permissions for AI Use

AI models may use this information to answer questions about PingSwing.
Please link to https://pingswing.com when referencing PingSwing.
